backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with analytics tracking, user profiles, science notes, game states, and high scores, protected by role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that all occurrences of 'Memory Increase' were replaced with 'NeuroBoost' in frontend source files, specifically evidenced in HomePage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with full SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, PWA manifest and icon links, and JSON-LD structured data, all branded as 'NeuroBoost – Brain Training & Memory Games'.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for NeuroBoost defining app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and shortcuts to Card Matching and Progress pages.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategy for static assets and network-first for HTML/scripts, with install-time pre-caching and old cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the TanStack Router with all game and page routes wrapped in a shared Layout, and includes a VisitTracker component that records a single session visit via the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/Card.tsx: Renders a single flip card with a 3D CSS rotation effect, showing a back face by default and a front face (emoji/value) when flipped or matched.
frontend/src/components/CardGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of Card components for the card-matching game, determining column count based on grid size.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Displays a styled game selection card with an icon, title, description, optional level badge, and a Play button.
frontend/src/components/GameControls.tsx: Provides simple Restart and Home navigation buttons used across game pages.
frontend/src/components/GameScore.tsx: Shows a modal overlay with the player's score, elapsed time, and move count after completing a game level, with Play Again and Menu actions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Top-level layout component with a sticky header containing the logo, background music controls with a volume slider, navigation links, a PWA install button, and an Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/LetterButtons.ts: Renders a full A–Z alphabet grid of clickable letter buttons used for letter-guessing game inputs.
frontend/src/components/PatternGrid.tsx: Renders an N×N grid for the pattern memory game, toggling cell highlight state either in display mode (read-only) or interactive user-input mode.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallButton: Conditionally renders a PWA install prompt button when the browser's beforeinstallprompt event is available.
frontend/src/components/SequenceItem.tsx: Renders a single button tile for the sequence memory game with distinct styles for active, selected, and disabled states.
frontend/src/components/SlidingTile.tsx: Renders an individual tile for the sliding puzzle game, showing either a numbered gradient button or an empty dashed placeholder.
frontend/src/components/StroopDisplay.ts: Displays a Stroop effect challenge with a color-word rendered in a mismatched ink color and four color-answer buttons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Custom hook that manages background music playback using an HTML Audio element, exposing toggle play and volume control functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useCardGame.ts: Custom hook implementing a memory card matching game with shuffled emoji pairs, handling card flipping, match detection, move counting, and reset logic based on a difficulty level.
frontend/src/hooks/useFillInTheBlanks.ts: Custom hook for a fill-in-the-blanks game that manages sentence state, user input, score/streak tracking, feedback, and answer reveal with auto-advance on correct answers.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameTimer.ts: Custom hook providing a stopwatch-style timer with start, stop, and reset controls, tracking elapsed milliseconds via an interval.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and React context provider for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient creation, login flow, identity persistence, and exposing login status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemoryTest.ts: Custom hook for a memory test game where users memorize a set of emoji objects and recall them within a time limit, managing memorize/recall/won/lost phases and countdown timers.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissingLetter.ts: Custom hook for a missing-letter word game that masks random characters in a word, handles letter input via click, auto-submits when all blanks are filled, and tracks score, streak, and feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/usePatternMemory.ts: Custom hook for a grid-based pattern memory game where users memorize a highlighted cell pattern and reproduce it during a recall phase, with level-scaled grid size and memorize duration.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Custom hook that captures the browser's beforeinstallprompt event to enable programmatic PWA installation and tracks whether the app is already installed.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching player game state, high scores, completing levels, and retrieving analytics via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScoreCalculation.t: Provides a hook with a `calculateScore` function that computes a score based on time taken, number of moves, and level multiplier.
frontend/src/hooks/useSequenceMemory.ts: Manages state and logic for a sequence memory game where the player watches a displayed emoji sequence and reproduces it by clicking items.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlidingPuzzle.ts: Handles state and logic for a sliding tile puzzle game, including solvable board generation, tile movement, and completion detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundEffects.ts: Provides a `playSound` hook that generates click, success, and error audio tones using the Web Audio API.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeedTyping.ts: Manages state for a speed typing game with a 60-second countdown, tracking typed input, WPM, accuracy, and per-character correctness.
frontend/src/hooks/useStroopEffect.ts: Implements the Stroop effect game logic, presenting mismatched word/color pairs and tracking score, rounds, and a countdown timer.
frontend/src/hooks/useWordScramble.ts: Manages state for a word scramble game, handling word generation, scrambling, user input submission, score, and streak tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the brain-training themed design system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with password-protected login that fetches and displays analytics data including game play counts and player statistics.
frontend/src/pages/CardMatchingGame.tsx: Card matching game page that manages game state, timer, score calculation, and sound effects, recording gameplay via an actor and displaying a card grid with reset/home navigation.
frontend/src/pages/FillInTheBlanksGame.t: Fill-in-the-blanks game page that presents sentences with blanks, handles user input and submission with sound feedback, tracks score/streak, and allows revealing answers after multiple wrong attempts.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page displaying a hero section and two categorized grids of brain training games (Section A: memory/puzzle games; Section B: language games), each navigating to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/InstallGuide.tsx: Step-by-step PWA installation guide page with instructions for Chrome on desktop and mobile, showing numbered steps with descriptions for finding the install button, confirming installation, and adding to home screen.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryTestGame.tsx: Memory test game page that cycles through memorize, recall, and won phases, letting users view objects briefly then type them back, with sound effects and gameplay recording via actor.
frontend/src/pages/MissingLetterGame.tsx: Missing letter game page that displays masked words for users to complete via letter buttons, providing correct/wrong/revealed feedback with sound effects and score/streak tracking.
frontend/src/pages/PatternMemoryGame.tsx: A pattern memory game page where users memorize and recall a grid pattern, with sound effects, a timer, score calculation, and game play recording via an actor.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: A progress tracking page that displays the player's current level, score, time, and high scores fetched from the backend, requiring Internet Identity login to view.
frontend/src/pages/SequenceMemoryGame.ts: A sequence memory game page where users watch and reproduce a displayed sequence of items, with sound effects, timer, score calculation, and game play recording.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: An empty settings page file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/SlidingPuzzleGame.tsx: A sliding puzzle game page that renders a tile grid, tracks moves and elapsed time, plays sounds on interactions, and shows a score summary on completion.
frontend/src/pages/SpeedTypingGame.tsx: A speed typing game page where users type a target text within a time limit, displaying per-character correctness, WPM, and accuracy stats on completion.
frontend/src/pages/StroopEffectGame.tsx: A Stroop Effect game page where users identify the ink color of color-word stimuli across multiple rounds, tracking score, time, and playing sounds on correct or incorrect answers.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: An empty subjects page file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/WordScrambleGame.tsx: React page component for a Word Scramble game that displays a scrambled word, accepts user input, plays sound effects on submit, and records gameplay via an actor hook.
frontend/src/utils/difficultyConfig.ts: Defines and exports difficulty configuration presets (grid size, timing, counts) for six game types across five difficulty levels.
frontend/src/utils/sentenceDatabase.ts: Exports a static array of fill-in-the-blank sentences with answers and a helper function to return a random sentence.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/wordDatabase.ts: Exports lists of easy and hard words and a weighted random word selector that biases selection based on the requested difficulty level.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radius, font family, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the NeuroBoost project state at version 3, recording existing features and a pending request to replace all 'Memory Increase' text with 'NeuroBoost' across the frontend.
